REPEAT 200 [
  SETPC (PICK [GOLD ORANGE CRIMSON ROSE SKYBLUE VIOLET TEAL])
  SETPENSIZE (0.5 + REPCOUNT / 60)
  FD (12 + REPCOUNT * 0.8)
  REPEAT (3 + MOD REPCOUNT 4) [ FD (REPCOUNT / 5) RT (360 / (3 + MOD REPCOUNT 4)) ]
  RT 81
  SETPC (PICK [WHITE MINT SKYBLUE])
  REPEAT 5 [ FD 6 RT 144 ]
  RT (REPCOUNT / 10)
]

variants.code:
SETBG BLACK
REPEAT 200 [
  IF (MOD REPCOUNT 20) = 0 [ PU FD REPCOUNT RT 90 PD ]
  SETPC (PICK [GOLD ORANGE CRIMSON ROSE SKYBLUE VIOLET TEAL LIME AMBER])
  SETPENSIZE (0.5 + REPCOUNT / 55)
  FD (10 + REPCOUNT * 0.75)
  REPEAT (4 + MOD REPCOUNT 3) [ FD (REPCOUNT / 4) RT (360 / (4 + MOD REPCOUNT 3)) ]
  RT 77
  SETPC (PICK [WHITE MINT SKYBLUE SILVER])
  REPEAT 5 [ FD 8 RT 144 ]
  RT (REPCOUNT / 8)
]
variants.reason: The periodic pen-up jumps successfully break the symmetry, creating a more fragmented and interesting distribution of color.

variants.code:

REPEAT 230 [
  IF (MOD REPCOUNT 20) = 0 [ PU FD REPCOUNT RT 90 PD ]
  SETPC (PICK [GOLD ORANGE CRIMSON ROSE SKYBLUE VIOLET TEAL INDIGO CORAL])
  SETPENSIZE (0.2 + REPCOUNT / 65)
  FD (14 + REPCOUNT * 0.85)
  REPEAT (3 + MOD REPCOUNT 5) [ FD (REPCOUNT / 6) RT (360 / (3 + MOD REPCOUNT 5)) ]
  RT 123
  SETPC (PICK [WHITE MINT YELLOW])
  REPEAT 5 [ FD 5 RT 144 ]
  RT (REPCOUNT / 12)
]
variants.reason: The higher iteration count and the 123-degree rotation create a much denser, more intricate web of color that perfectly fits the aesthetic goal.

TO SET_COLOR :N
SETPC (MOD :N 15) + 1
END

TO WING :SIZE :ANGLE :STEP
IF :SIZE < 5 [STOP]
SET_COLOR :SIZE
SETPW :SIZE / 20
FD :SIZE
RT :ANGLE
WING (:SIZE - :STEP) (:ANGLE + 1) :STEP
BK :SIZE
LT :ANGLE
END

TO ORBIT :R :A
PU
SETXY (:R * SIN :A) (:R * COS :A)
PD
END

TO CROWN :DEPTH
IF :DEPTH = 0 [STOP]
SET_COLOR :DEPTH * 10
REPEAT 6 [
FD :DEPTH * 2
RT 60
WING (:DEPTH * 1.5) 45 3
BK :DEPTH * 2
]
END

SETBG 0
HT
MAKE "R 0
MAKE "A 0
REPEAT 120 [
MAKE "R (:R + 2.5)
MAKE "A (:A + 13.1)
ORBIT :R :A
SET_COLOR :R
SETPW 1
WING (20 + (MOD :R 50)) (30 + (MOD :A 20)) 2
IF (MOD REPCOUNT 15) = 0 [
PU FD 40 PD
CROWN (MOD REPCOUNT 30)
PU BK 40 PD
]
]
END

SETBG 0
HT
PU SETXY 0 0 PD
REPEAT 45 [
SET_COLOR REPCOUNT
SETPW (45 - REPCOUNT) / 5
FD REPCOUNT * 4
RT 91
WING (REPCOUNT * 2) (REPCOUNT * 1.5) 5
PU
SETXY (SIN (REPCOUNT * 10) * 100) (COS (REPCOUNT * 15) * 100)
PD
REPEAT 4 [
SET_COLOR (REPCOUNT * 3)
ARC 360 (REPCOUNT * 2)
RT 90
]
]
END

TO MASTER_PIECE
ASYMM_FLORAL
PU SETXY -200 150 PD
DRAW_COMPLEX
PU SETXY 200 -150 PD
REPEAT 8 [
CROWN 40
RT 45
]
END

TO COLORS :R :G :B
  SETPC (LIST :R :G :B)
END

TO VINE :LEN :ANG :DEPTH
  IF :DEPTH = 0 [STOP]
  SETPW :DEPTH * 0.8
  COLORS (ABS(SIN(:LEN * 0.02) * 255)) (ABS(COS(:DEPTH * 10) * 255)) (ABS(SIN(:ANG) * 255))
  FD :LEN
  RT :ANG
  VINE (:LEN * 0.98) (:ANG + 0.2) (:DEPTH - 1)
  PU BK :LEN PD
  LT :ANG
END

TO PETAL :SIZE :COLOR_SEED
  REPEAT 2 [
    REPEAT 90 [
      COLORS (MOD (REPCOUNT * 2 + :COLOR_SEED) 255) (MOD (REPCOUNT * 5) 255) (200)
      FD :SIZE RT 1
    ]
    RT 90
  ]
END

TO ORNAMENT :X :Y :SCALE
  PU SETXY :X :Y PD
  REPEAT 8 [
    PETAL :SCALE (REPCOUNT * 30)
    RT 45
  ]
END

TO MAIN
  CS SETBG [5 5 15] HT
  PU SETXY -100 -200 PD
  
  ; Layer 1: The Asymmetric Growth
  REPEAT 4 [
    PU SETXY (REPCOUNT * 60 - 150) (REPCOUNT * 40 - 100) PD
    VINE (20 + REPCOUNT * 5) (35 + REPCOUNT) 150
  ]

  ; Layer 2: Complex Overlays
  MAKE "STEP 1
  PU SETXY 0 0 PD
  REPEAT 400 [
    MAKE "R (127 + 127 * SIN(:STEP * 0.05))
    MAKE "G (127 + 127 * SIN(:STEP * 0.03))
    MAKE "B (127 + 127 * SIN(:STEP * 0.01))
    SETPC (LIST :R :G :B)
    SETPW (:STEP / 100)
    FD :STEP
    RT (144 + :STEP / 500)
    IF (MOD REPCOUNT 40 = 0) [
      CIRCLE (:STEP / 5)
    ]
    MAKE "STEP (:STEP + 1.2)
  ]

  ; Layer 3: Asymmetric Accents
  ORNAMENT 200 150 0.8
  ORNAMENT -250 -100 0.5
  ORNAMENT 100 -250 0.3
  
  ; Layer 4: Fine Details
  PU SETXY -300 200 PD
  REPEAT 360 [
    COLORS (REPCOUNT % 255) (255 - (REPCOUNT % 255)) (150)
    FD (SIN(REPCOUNT * 5) * 10)
    RT 1
    IF (MOD REPCOUNT 10 = 0) [
      ARC 30 (REPCOUNT / 2)
    ]
  ]
END

MAIN

TO SET_COLOR :N
SETPC (MOD :N 15) + 1
END

TO WING :SIZE :ANGLE :STEP
IF :SIZE < 5 [STOP]
SET_COLOR :SIZE
SETPW :SIZE / 20
FD :SIZE
RT :ANGLE
WING (:SIZE - :STEP) (:ANGLE + 1) :STEP
BK :SIZE
LT :ANGLE
END

TO ORBIT :R :A
PU
SETXY (:R * SIN :A) (:R * COS :A)
PD
END

TO CROWN :DEPTH

FD :DEPTH * 2
RT 60

BK :DEPTH * 2
]
END

TO DRAW_COMPLEX
CS
SETBG 0
HT
MAKE "R 0
MAKE "A 0
REPEAT 120 [
MAKE "R (:R + 2.5)
MAKE "A (:A + 13.1)
ORBIT :R :A
SET_COLOR :R
SETPW 1
WING (20 + (MOD :R 50)) (30 + (MOD :A 20)) 2
IF (MOD REPCOUNT 15) = 0 [
PU FD 40 PD
CROWN (MOD REPCOUNT 30)
PU BK 40 PD
]
]
END

TO ASYMM_FLORAL

SETBG 0
HT
PU SETXY 0 0 PD
REPEAT 45 [
SET_COLOR REPCOUNT
SETPW (45 - REPCOUNT) / 5
FD REPCOUNT * 4
RT 91
WING (REPCOUNT * 2) (REPCOUNT * 1.5) 5
PU
SETXY (SIN (REPCOUNT * 10) * 100) (COS (REPCOUNT * 15) * 100)
PD
REPEAT 4 [
SET_COLOR (REPCOUNT * 3)
ARC 360 (REPCOUNT * 2)
RT 90
]
]
END

]

Make it as visually compelling and sophisticated as possible.
Return ONLY the Logo code.
apiLog.responseText:
TO COLORS :R :G :B
  SETPC (LIST :R :G :B)
END

TO VINE :LEN :ANG :DEPTH
  IF :DEPTH = 0 [STOP]
  SETPW :DEPTH * 0.8
  COLORS (ABS(SIN(:LEN * 0.02) * 255)) (ABS(COS(:DEPTH * 10) * 255)) (ABS(SIN(:ANG) * 255))
  FD :LEN
  RT :ANG
  VINE (:LEN * 0.98) (:ANG + 0.2) (:DEPTH - 1)
  PU BK :LEN PD
  LT :ANG
END

TO PETAL :SIZE :COLOR_SEED
  REPEAT 2 [
    REPEAT 90 [
      COLORS (MOD (REPCOUNT * 2 + :COLOR_SEED) 255) (MOD (REPCOUNT * 5) 255) (200)
      FD :SIZE RT 1
    ]
    RT 90
  ]
END

TO ORNAMENT :X :Y :SCALE
  PU SETXY :X :Y PD
  REPEAT 8 [
    PETAL :SCALE (REPCOUNT * 30)
    RT 45
  ]
END

TO MAIN
  CS SETBG [5 5 15] HT
  PU SETXY -100 -200 PD
  
  ; Layer 1: The Asymmetric Growth
  REPEAT 4 [
    PU SETXY (REPCOUNT * 60 - 150) (REPCOUNT * 40 - 100) PD
    VINE (20 + REPCOUNT * 5) (35 + REPCOUNT) 150
  ]

  ; Layer 2: Complex Overlays
  MAKE "STEP 1
  PU SETXY 0 0 PD
  REPEAT 400 [
    MAKE "R (127 + 127 * SIN(:STEP * 0.05))
    MAKE "G (127 + 127 * SIN(:STEP * 0.03))
    MAKE "B (127 + 127 * SIN(:STEP * 0.01))
    SETPC (LIST :R :G :B)
    SETPW (:STEP / 100)
    FD :STEP
    RT (144 + :STEP / 500)
    IF (MOD REPCOUNT 40 = 0) [
      CIRCLE (:STEP / 5)
    ]
    MAKE "STEP (:STEP + 1.2)
  ]

  ; Layer 3: Asymmetric Accents
  ORNAMENT 200 150 0.8
  ORNAMENT -250 -100 0.5
  ORNAMENT 100 -250 0.3
  
  ; Layer 4: Fine Details
  PU SETXY -300 200 PD
  REPEAT 360 [
    COLORS (REPCOUNT % 255) (255 - (REPCOUNT % 255)) (150)
    FD (SIN(REPCOUNT * 5) * 10)
    RT 1
    IF (MOD REPCOUNT 10 = 0) [
      ARC 30 (REPCOUNT / 2)
    ]
  ]
END

MAIN

apiLog.systemPrompt:
You are an expert Logo turtle graphics generative artist.

TASK: Generate the requested number of visually distinct variants that are more aesthetically interesting.

INPUTS (in the user message):
- Aesthetic goal: user's taste preference
- Change magnitude: how drastically to evolve
- Base program: Logo code to evolve
- Critic feedback (if iterating): suggestions from previous round

OUTPUT FORMAT - CRITICAL: return ONLY variant blocks:
---VARIANT 1---
[complete Logo code]
---VARIANT 2---
[complete Logo code]

MAGNITUDE RULE: The STRICT MAGNITUDE CONSTRAINT in the user message is absolute. Magnitude 1: change exactly one number. Magnitude 2: change 2-3 numbers. Magnitude 3: change several parameters or add one simple command. Never add new procedures or structural changes at magnitudes 1-3.

COMPLETENESS RULE: Every variant MUST be a complete, runnable Logo program. Verify: (1) every [ has a matching ]; (2) every TO has a matching END; (3) the last line is complete. Do NOT include ANY reasoning, thinking, or commentary inside variant blocks.

Commands: FD BK RT LT PU PD HOME CS REPEAT n [ ] TO name :p (body) END MAKE "var val :var SETHEADING SETXY SETPC SETPENCOLOR SETPENSIZE SETWIDTH SETBG ARC CIRCLE DOT IF IFELSE WHILE FOR SIN COS SQRT RANDOM INT ABS MOD MAX MIN REPCOUNT OUTPUT STOP ITEM PICK COUNT FIRST LAST BUTFIRST BUTLAST SENTENCE WORD FPUT LPUT

SETPC/SETBG: number 0-15, named color (RED BLUE GREEN CYAN MAGENTA YELLOW WHITE BLACK ORANGE PURPLE GOLD TEAL LIME VIOLET INDIGO CRIMSON CORAL SKYBLUE MINT ROSE AMBER GRAY SILVER MAROON OLIVE), or [r g b] 0-255. ITEM/PICK work on color lists: SETPC (ITEM 1 [RED GOLD SKYBLUE]) or SETPC (PICK [RED GOLD SKYBLUE]).
Canvas 400x400, origin center, North=up. FINITE programs. TO...END before calling. Under 60 lines.
